# slicedlabs — keybindings

## slicedlabs

### Tabs

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+1` | Tab: Chat |
| `Ctrl+2` | Tab: Agents |
| `Ctrl+3` | Tab: Cost |
| `Ctrl+4` | Tab: Audit |
| `Ctrl+5` | Tab: Memory |
| `Ctrl+6` | Tab: Control |

### Action

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+P` | Command palette |
| `Ctrl+Q` | Quit the TUI |
